$description: Brand primitives shared byte-for-byte by BOTH the operator console (umi-dashboard) and the marketing site (umi-landing-page). These are the only genuinely cross-app values; every other token is app-scoped (see dashboard.json / landing.json). App tokens reference these with the DTCG alias syntax {color.navy}.

navy.$description: Azul Marino UMI — primary brand navy. dashboard --umi-navy · landing umi-blue.dark

blue.$description: Azul UMI — brand blue. dashboard --umi-blue / --info · landing umi-light-blue.DEFAULT / umi-blue.light
